description: A bit more about Cecylia — work, speaking, reading, and where to find me online.

paragraphs: I'm a generalist: lots of interests, never quite enough time for all of them. I write this site in English and Polish about tech, everyday life, and culture — observations, things I'm learning, and whatever else I want to think through in public.
If the homepage is the short version, this is the slightly longer one.

sections.heading: Work
paragraphs: By day I'm at Splunk, building tools and experiences for other developers — mostly frontend, documentation, and internal developer workflows. I care about making technical systems easier to understand and use.
For a full professional history, LinkedIn is the right place.

sections.heading: Speaking
paragraphs: I'm active in Toastmasters, practicing public speaking and structured feedback. I don't have external talks to link yet; when I do, they'll show up here too.

list.label: Goodreads
list.note: Books I read and rate — fiction, essays, and whatever I'm curious about.

list.text: Update this when you like — title, author, and a line on why it's on your nightstand.
